action.reasoning: Observation: Data explored - 9993 train, 986 val, 1199 test, vocab size 134, max image 320x1600. Need to build HMER system. Decision: Implement DenseNet-121 encoder + Transformer decoder with attention, train for a few epochs, submit eval to measure iteration time and get baseline.
